code:
import io
import string

let target_opt = io.read_line()
let target = match target_opt
when Some(t)
  t
when None
  ""
end

let body = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(body)
mut count = 0
mut i = 0
mut current = ""
while i < n
  let b_opt = string.byte_at(body, i)
  let b = match b_opt
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if string.len(current) > 0
      if current == target
        count = count + 1
      end
      current = ""
    end
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if string.len(current) > 0
  if current == target
    count = count + 1
  end
end
println("count=#{count}")
